results.title: Inside Sam Neill's New Zealand Estate where Jurassic Park star built a winery and named farm animals after celebrities
results.description: Jurassic Park star Sam Neill has died at the age of seventy-eight. His family announced his passing in Sydney, Australia, surrounded by loved ones. Neill was known for his acting career and his New Zealand winery, Two Paddocks. He often stated his vineyard was his greatest passion and a source of happiness. The actor spent years planting native trees and enjoying the land.

results.title: Kankola / Tailed Pepper in Ayurveda : The Aromatic Fruit for Digestion, Kapha and Respiratory Balance
results.description: The name “tailed pepper” comes from the small stalk attached to the dried berry, giving it a tail-like appearance. It resembles black pepper but has a more aromatic, slightly bitter and camphor-like fragrance. The post Kankola / Tailed Pepper in Ayurveda : The Aromatic Fruit for Digestion, Kapha and Respiratory Balance appeared first on Dharmakshethra - India Unabridged | Defence, Diplomacy, Economy, Health, Ayurveda, Heritage .

results.title: Can the discovery of the first 'true sugar' in deep space explain how life began on Earth?
results.description: Astronomers have discovered the first true sugar molecule, erythrulose, in interstellar space near the centre of the Milky Way, a finding that could offer new clues about how the building blocks of life formed and reached Earth.

results.title: India office leasing hits 37.9 million sq. ft. in Jan-June
results.description: India’s office market hits a decade-high net absorption of 26.9 million sq. ft. in H1 2026, driven by record-breaking GCC activity and a surge in domestic leasing.
